title: Baby Bio Orchid Food, 175ml - Fertiliser for Healthy Growth and Vibrant Flowering - Easy To Use House Plant Care - Concentrate Plant Food - Indoor Plant Nutrition
features: HEALTHY ORCHID: Gives your Orchids a healthier look, with lush green leaves and vibrant flowers
ORCHID NUTRITION: Contains all the essential nutrients needed to support and encourage strong root growth
SEASONAL: Use during the growing season for healthy and vibrant blooms that make your Orchid stand out
INDOOR USE: For use with an Orchid in your home or conservatory for the best results
NOTE: This product does not have an expiry date, the date on the product is the manufacturing date
description: From the manufacturer TRUSTED NUTRITION FOR BEAUTIFUL, LONGER LASTING ORCHIDS HIGH CONCENTRATION A concentrated formula 175ml makes up to 70L of plant-nourishing solution, delivering incredible value and care for your orchids GROW & BLOOM This all-in-one solution provides everything orchids need in one easy step. No need for separate feeds support every stage of growth, from strong roots and lush foliage to vibrant blooms, with a single, balanced formula. Perfect for simplifying plant care while ensuring optimal results. PERFECTLY BALANCED Designed for feeding little and often, ensuring your orchids receive consistent, gentle nourishment without the risk of over-fertilizing. By delivering nutrients in the right amounts, it promotes stronger roots, vibrant blooms, and overall healthier orchids. product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Do not ingest. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat and open flames. Always wear gloves and protective clothing when handling. In case of accidental contact, rinse thoroughly with water. If ingested, seek medical attention immediately.
